title: pinellia tuberifera
intro: Pinellia tuberifera, also known as the Chinese pinellia or tuberous pinellia, is a type of flowering plant in the family Arum. It is a perennial herb used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Pinellia tuberifera include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce fever. Pinellia tuberifera is often prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or extracts, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
